evidence_summary: Establish the protagonist's physical vulnerability and the alien physics of Mars through a transition from disorientation to uncontrolled movement. The environment must feel vast yet claustrophobic due to the low-walled incubator structure.
The protagonist wakes up on Mars, naked and disoriented. He discovers that the low gravity makes normal movement impossible, causing him to leap uncontrollably with every step.
protagonist lying prone on yellowish moss, disoriented.
protagonist leaping uncontrollably across the basin floor.
Protagonist attempts to stand and walk but triggers high-altitude leaps due to low gravity.
